subject: [PATCH v6 08/15] mm: handle VM_UFFD_RWP in khugepaged, rmap, and GUP

2026-05-29.patch_summary: This patch extends three Linux kernel paths to treat VM_UFFD_RWP (User Faultfd Read-Write Protected) the same as VM_UFFD_WP (User Faultfd Write Protected). The affected paths are khugepaged, rmap, and GUP. In khugepaged, ranges with VM_UFFD_RWP markers are protected from collapse. In rmap, unmap batching is capped at 1 for VM_UFFD_RWP to ensure each PTE can be handled individually. In GUP, faults are forced on VM_UFFD_RWP VMAs regardless of FOLL_HONOR_NUMA_FAULT, as RWP uses protnone as an access-tracking marker rather than a NUMA hinting marker.
